title: McPvP Stats Tracker + QoL
description: Stats / Playtime tracking and QoL modules for mcpvp.club
body:
MCPVP Stat Tracker is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for mcpvp.club that tracks your PvP performance and shows it in a clean HUD + a modern in-game ClickGUI.

Key features:

- Session + lifetime stats, mode-specific
- Auto mode detection (inventory-based) or manual mode selection
- Home dashboard: month activity heatmap, tooltips, weekly breakdown
- Modern ClickGUI **(default keybind: "." dot)**
---
- AutoGG module with editable message
- Stats HUD Widget / Target HUD Widget (Display Health, Combo Counter, Hit comparison)
- Hand shader, Hand tweaks, ambient particles, jump circles and more...
- more planned...

![stat widget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8195ccfe4662239389949f027a128c9534507242_0.webp)

Client-side only. Designed specifically for mcpvp.club - "neol1no" on discord
